articles.title: 'Plays like gully cricket': Mohammed Kaif in awe of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's blazing century

Kaif lauded the youngster's fearless, aggressive approach against top bowlers, calling him a rare, once-in-a-generation talent. His consistent high strike-rate and mature batting suggest a bright future for Indian cricket.

articles.title: Hurricanes Sweep Senators To Become First Team To Advance

Taylor Hall added a goal and an assist before Sebastian Aho buried two pucks into the empty net. Frederik Andersen made 25 saves. And Seth Jarvis chipped in two assists for the first NHL team to advance into Round 2.
